ogTitle: Point Wilson vs Polisbet: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Point Wilson and Polisbet.
heading: Point Wilson vs Polisbet — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Point Wilson, Victoria and Polisbet, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Point Wilson has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Polisbet (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Point Wilson or Polisbet safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Point Wilson has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Polisbet scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Point Wilson scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Polisbet scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Point Wilson or Polisbet?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Point Wilson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
